introSection: Little Rattler is a steel roller coaster located at Leofoo Village Theme Park in Guanxi, Hsinchu, Taiwan.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Little Rattler is one of Vekoma's 335m Roller Skater models. This is the largest model Vekoma offers.

fullText:
Little Rattler is a steel roller coaster located at Leofoo Village Theme Park in Guanxi, Hsinchu, Taiwan.

Little Rattler is one of Vekoma's 335m Roller Skater models. This is the largest model Vekoma offers.
